results.overall_itc_remark: 1 of 1 line(s) need attention. Line 1 (Insurance agent commission) — Needs review: “Insurance agent commission” may fall under the food/club/employee-benefit rule (§17(5)(b)(i)); confirm the use before claiming.
results.overall_itc_remark_plain: Needs review — 0 of 1 line(s) are fine; 1 need a closer look. On the line(s) below the bill doesn't show how the item was used, and the use is what decides whether the credit is allowed. Blocked for food, beverages, club or fitness membership and similar staff benefits, unless the law makes providing them compulsory (§17(5)(b)). Line 1 (Insurance agent commission, ₹60,000): Use not stated on the bill.
overall_itc_next_steps: If the item is a normal business input, the credit is allowed — tag the line eligible.
If it was used for food/welfare/insurance use, the credit is blocked (§17(5)(b)(i)) — tag the line ineligible.
